refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall (1) derive performance requirements from worksite mission context, (2) record these performance requirements with traceability to inputs, and (3) manage updates and history of performance baselines and calibrations.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad and combines multiple functions: derivation, recording, and management of performance requirements. Decomposing clarifies verification and design focus.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify derivation by comparing generated requirements against mission inputs; verify recording by audit of stored data; verify management by tracking history and updates over time.
sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Manage updates and history of performance baselines and calibrations

candidate_dps: Algorithmic derivation engine using mission input models
Database schema and storage for performance requirements and history
Version control and update management system for baselines/calibrations
selected_dp.selected_dp: Integrated software subsystem combining derivation engine, database storage, and update management modules

potential_sources: Tight coupling between derivation logic and database schema
Update management depends on both derivation outputs and stored data
coupling_check.notes: Coupling is expected and manageable within a single integrated software subsystem; interfaces can be well defined internally.

assumptions_risks: Assumes mission context inputs are well defined and accessible
Risk of data inconsistency if update management is not robust
High safety criticality requires rigorous validation of derivation logic
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider modularizing update management separately if complexity grows

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Software subsystem responsible for performance requirement derivation, recording, and management within the overall NGHE system

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives mission context and operational data inputs for derivation

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Outputs derived performance targets to other NGHE subsystems

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data synchronization and update propagation with remote modules

module_containment_scores.notes: Primary owner of performance requirement logic and data; minimal diffusion
Vehicle module consumes performance targets but does not contain derivation or management
No direct involvement in performance requirement derivation or management
Safety alerts may be influenced by performance but no containment of derivation logic

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing performance requirement derivation and management in NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and supports traceability.
containment_risks: Potential bottleneck if NGHE Solution module becomes too complex
Risk of interface overload with other modules if not well managed
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor complexity growth; consider splitting update management if needed

fr_dp_gate.reason: FR refinement clearly decomposes the original requirement; selected DP logically addresses each sub-FR with manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Low diffusion risk as containment is centralized in NGHE Solution module
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support ownership assignment; interfaces are well defined and limited.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via telemetry data validation, audit trails, and update logs within NGHE Solution module.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of functions to NGHE Solution module with defined external interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Consider modularizing update management if complexity or diffusion increases
Ensure rigorous validation of derivation algorithms due to high safety criticality

decision.justification: While the current decomposition and assignments are sound, the complexity of update management and safety criticality suggest revisiting DP modularization and IM containment soon.
next_level_sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Manage updates and history of performance baselines and calibrations

revise.why: To explore modularization of update management and improve separation of concerns for maintainability and safety assurance

assumptions: Mission context inputs are accessible and reliable
NGHE Solution module can handle integrated functions without excessive complexity
open_risks: Data consistency and update management robustness
Verification rigor for derivation algorithms given safety criticality
evidence_needed: Demonstration of derivation accuracy and traceability
Audit logs and update history completeness
